reference_machine: Apple M5 Pro MacBook Pro, 18 cores, 48 GB RAM
refreeze_reason: The July 23 refreeze binds the same 25-case SEC corpus to the revised ornith:9b pipeline after locally binding agreement-chain ambiguity to the decision counterparty and adding echo-safe AstraZeneca work-order projections. Five affected-case reference-machine pilots all produced the intended trust state; the slowest Brief was 40.264 seconds. The immediately preceding full-corpus baseline was p50 20.729 seconds and p95 36.266 seconds. Ask generation was unchanged. The 45-second regression budget and ten-minute first-value contract remain unchanged.
invalidation_rule: Re-measure and re-freeze when the model, prompt scheme, retrieval pipeline, corpus, or reference machine changes.
